description_zh: 卡尔文·克莱因（Calvin Klein）是美国最具标志性的生活方式时尚品牌之一，1968年由卡尔文·克莱因在纽约创立。品牌以极简主义美学、干净的线条和性感广告风格闻名于世。CK在20世纪70年代率先推出设计师牛仔裤系列，开创了时装品牌涉足牛仔市场的先河；80年代的内衣和香水广告因启用年轻模特和极具争议的性暗示画面而轰动全球。品牌极简的标志性Logo——纯白背景上的黑色「Calvin Klein」字母——成为90年代极简美学的视觉符号。CK的产品线覆盖成衣、牛仔、内衣、香水、手表和配饰，其中CK One香水在90年代成为中性香水的开创性作品。品牌如今隶属于PVH集团，在全球拥有广泛的分销网络。卡尔文·克莱因以其「少即是多」的设计哲学，深刻影响了现代时尚的审美走向。

languages.en: Calvin Klein is one of America's most iconic lifestyle fashion brands, founded in 1968 by Calvin Klein in New York City. Renowned for its minimalist aesthetic, clean lines, and provocative advertising campaigns, CK pioneered the designer jeans category in the 1970s and caused global sensations in the 1980s with its underwear and fragrance ads featuring young models and suggestive imagery. The brand's iconic minimalist logo — black 'Calvin Klein' lettering on a white background — became the visual symbol of 1990s minimalism. CK's product range spans ready-to-wear, denim, underwear, fragrances, watches, and accessories, with CK One fragrance pioneering the unisex perfume category in the 1990s. Now owned by PVH Corp, Calvin Klein maintains extensive global distribution. With its 'less is more' design philosophy, Calvin Klein has profoundly influenced modern fashion aesthetics.
